seo_title: Omega-3 DHA and FDA Qualified Health Claims: What Women Over 40 Actually Need to Know | Happy Aging
meta_description: The FDA qualified health claim for omega-3 is about heart health, not brain health in adults. Here's what the MIDAS trial and DHA research actually shows for women over 40 who want cognitive support.
